semantic.role: Feature request template for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Defining the structure for submitting new capability or workflow improvement proposals
Capturing the problem to solve, proposed solution, and alternatives considered
outOfScope: Bug reports or issue tracking unrelated to new features

English.purpose: This document provides a standardized template for submitting feature requests to the ArchSpine project. It ensures that all proposals clearly articulate the problem, the desired solution, and any alternative approaches considered.
English.context_and_audience: This template is intended for contributors and users of the ArchSpine mirror system who wish to propose new capabilities or workflow improvements. It helps maintain consistency and completeness in feature request submissions.
key_takeaways: Feature requests must describe the problem to solve
Proposed solutions should detail expected behavior, commands, or UX
Alternatives considered help evaluate the proposal's necessity and scope

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档为 ArchSpine 项目提供了一个标准化的功能请求模板，确保所有提案都能清晰阐述问题、期望的解决方案以及已考虑的其他替代方案。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 该模板面向 ArchSpine 镜像系统的贡献者和用户，适用于希望提出新功能或工作流程改进的场景，有助于保持功能请求提交的一致性和完整性。
key_takeaways: 功能请求必须描述需要解决的问题
提案解决方案应详细说明预期的行为、命令或用户体验
已考虑的替代方案有助于评估提案的必要性和范围
